entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Welcome to my humble lair, fellow traveler! Make yourself at home!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Ah, I see, you've been sent here by the one and only Casino Master himself.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Finally, he has heard my pleas for a new apprentice! He's had me doing all this poorman's labor for nary a pence! Huzzah!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Alright, allow me to show you the dwelling where you will be practicing your sorcery.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Behind me is an entrance to a long-forgotten chamber, where no mortal has dared to set foot.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: However, I am in no shape to venture deeper, as just a few blue moons ago, I contracted a paralyzing case of Wizard's Athlete's Foot!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: But forsooth, traveler! If you are brave, step into the hole behind me. And fear not the fall - it will cause you no harm.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: What can wound you, however, are the fiends hiding in that dreadful dungeon! I have prepared a small allowance for anyone who is brave enough to dispatch them.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Along the way, you may also find belongings I forgot a long time ago. Pharaoh willing, they will help you along your expedition.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Now gather your courage and go! T'would be rude to deny the request of a wizened wizard like myself.

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: I will be here whenever you need me, and may fortune be on your side!
